hZ : Nonempty ↥Z
hq_pow_pos : ∀ (m : ℕ), 1 ≤ q ^ m

h₁_dvd : eval (↑q) (phi n) ∣ eval (↑q) (X ^ n - 1)

have h_dvd : n_k A ∣ n := h_n_k_A_dvd A
        have h_ne : n_k A ≠ n := by
          intro h_eq
          have h_centralizer_card : Fintype.card (Set.centralizer ({(A : ConjClasses Rˣ).out} : Set Rˣ)) = q ^ n - 1 := by
            rw [← h_R]
            exact (this A).symm ▸ by simp [h_eq]
          have h_conj_class_card : Fintype.card ((A : ConjClasses Rˣ).carrier) = 1 := by
            rw [← Nat.div_self (by omega : 0 < q ^ n - 1)]
            rw [← h_centralizer_card]
            exact (this A).symm ▸ by simp
          have h_noncenter : Fintype.card ((A : ConjClasses Rˣ).carrier) > 1 := A.prop
          linarith
        exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_dvd (by omega : 0 < n) h_dvd) h_ne

have h_dvd : n_k A ∣ n := h_n_k_A_dvd A
        have h_ne : n_k A ≠ n := by
          intro h_eq
          have h_card_cent : Fintype.card (Set.centralizer ({(A : ConjClasses Rˣ).out} : Set Rˣ)) = q ^ n := by
            rw [h_eq, pow_succ]
            -- But centralizer of a noncentral element is a proper subring, so its cardinality is strictly less than q^n
            -- Contradiction with the fact that A is in noncenter, so centralizer is proper
            have h_proper : Set.centralizer ({(A : ConjClasses Rˣ).out} : Set Rˣ) ≠ Set.univ := by
              intro h_full
              have h_center : (A : ConjClasses Rˣ).out ∈ Submonoid.center Rˣ := by
                simp only [Set.centralizer_univ, Set.mem_univ, forall_true_left] at h_full
                exact Set.mem_centralizer_iff.mp (h_full (A : ConjClasses Rˣ).out rfl)
              have h_contradiction : A ∉ ConjClasses.noncenter Rˣ := by
                simp only [ConjClasses.noncenter, Set.mem_setOf_eq, not_not]
                exact ⟨(A : ConjClasses Rˣ).out, h_center⟩
              exact S'.ne_empty (by simpa using h_contradiction)
            have h_card_le : Fintype.card (Set.centralizer ({(A : ConjClasses Rˣ).out} : Set Rˣ)) < Fintype.card R := by
              exact Fintype.card_lt_of_subset_of_ne (Set.centralizer_subset) h_proper
            rw [h_card, ← h_card_cent] at h_card_le
            linarith
          linarith
        exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_n) h_dvd) h_ne

have h_dvd := h_n_k_A_dvd A
        have h_ne : n_k A ≠ n := by
          intro h_eq
          have h_card_centralizer := this A
          rw [h_eq] at h_card_centralizer
          simp_all
        exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.le_of_dvd (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero h_n) h_dvd) h_ne
